replay_similarity_note: operationally identical (Step 3: all fragility metrics within noise)
rationale: SM is simpler (15 vs ~20 params) with identical trade structure and replay fragility. LATCH hysteresis adds complexity with zero measurable benefit.

rationale: E0_plus dominates under LT1. E0 is the safer fallback under LT2 due to lower delay sensitivity. Both serve distinct latency roles.
